## Pages
- [About Us - WATFlight](/about): Learn about WATFlight
- [Our Team - WATFlight](/team): Meet the talented engineering students behind WATFlight
- [Projects - WATFlight](/projects): Explore WATFlight
- [Sponsors - WATFlight](/sponsors): Meet the companies and organizations supporting WATFlight
- [WATFlight - Advancing Aerospace Innovation](/home): Student-led aerospace engineering team at the University of Waterloo, building the future of flight through innovative UAV and propulsion projects.
